	URL: https://kiande.com
	Language: English
	Stack: Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS — no framework, no build step, no dependencies
	Type: Installable PWA, fully offline, all data on device
	Fonts: Rajdhani, Chakra Petch (self-hosted)
